title: TSEG's Lean Wither Storm
description: Crackers Wither Storm Mod resource pack that makes things more purplish (lean).
body:
### Lean Storm is a custom resource pack that changes some of the textures & colors in [Crackers Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod).


These changes include:

- **Purple Teeth Color!** (including hurt heads)
- **Purple Flashing Color During Phase 7.5!**
- **Custom Purplish Sky Colors!** 
- **Custom Purplish Tractor Beam Colors!**


This pack is also somewhat compatible with [Totally Accurate Wither Storm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/totally-accurate-wither-storm).
Just make sure to place this pack at the very top for it to show up.
**I may consider adding full support in the future.**
